toxic-orb.name: Toxic Orb
toxic-orb.effect: Held: Inflicts Toxic on the holder at the end of the turn. Activates after Poison damage would occur.

twisted-spoon.name: Twisted Spoon
twisted-spoon.effect: Held: Psychic-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

ultra-ball.name: Ultra Ball
ultra-ball.effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 2×.

up-grade.name: Up Grade
up-grade.effect: Traded on a Porygon: Holder evolves into Porygon2.

water-gem.name: Water Gem
water-gem.effect: Held: When the holder uses a damaging water-type move, the move has 1.5× power and this item is consumed.

water-stone.name: Water Stone
water-stone.effect: Evolves an Eevee into Vaporeon, a Lombre into Ludicolo, a Panpour into Simipour, a Poliwhirl into Poliwrath, a Shellder into Cloyster, or a Staryu into Starmie.

wide-lens.name: Wide Lens
wide-lens.effect: Held: Provides a 1/10 (10%) boost in accuracy to the holder.

wiki-berry.name: Wiki Berry
wiki-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike dry flavor.

wise-glasses.name: Wise Glasses
wise-glasses.effect: Held: Boosts the damage of special moves used by the holder by 1/10 (10%).

x-accuracy.name: X Accuracy
x-accuracy.effect: Raises accuracy by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

x-attack.name: X Attack
x-attack.effect: Raises Attack by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

x-sp-def.name: X Sp Def
x-sp-def.effect: Raises Special Defense by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

x-sp-atk.name: X Sp Atk
x-sp-atk.effect: Raises Special Attack by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

x-speed.name: X Speed
x-speed.effect: Raises Speed by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.

yellow-shard.name: Yellow Shard
yellow-shard.effect: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.

zoom-lens.name: Zoom Lens
zoom-lens.effect: Held: Provides a 1/5 (20%) boost in accuracy if the holder moves after the target.
